null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: Searched Bengaluru cool/cloudy weather, heavy rain, waterlogging, and IMD alerts around Aug 25, 2025; found only general August climate averages and unrelated dated rain events (July, Oct 2025). A cloudy monsoon cool day plausibly generates no coverage; the flag remains reanalysis-only.

Deccan Herald (Dec 12, 2025), citing IMD: Bengaluru entering its 'coldest December phase in recent years', 12-14°C minimums forecast through the following week (spanning Dec 20). No exact date/value match for Dec 20.
